legacy_metric_rule: Rows whose evidence_metric is ret_excel_visible_v1 are historical metric-development records only and are ineligible for a current H_PI, H_obs, null, positive or ceiling claim.

practical_gate.terminal_boundary_rule: A family is eligible for Return B only when a same-contract global proof has UCB95 strictly below 0.01, or an exact global zero/formal global dominance proof, under a complete comparator and componentwise-matched resource vector.

terminal_b_support_reason: No current terminal return: sixteen registered mechanism families lack a family-wide canonical quantitative ceiling and the active M/T/R family lacks a full-horizon optimizer or rigorous global upper bound. Current-kernel action absence does not bound a proposed extension.

families.searched_contract: thesis-native homogeneous kernel is exact-null; Program O's corrected 256-calendar transducer screen passed four cells with exact fungible null and fresh simultaneous validation is frozen
families.evidence_required_to_terminalize: Program O must clear the affected-order gate, corrected exact transducer and full-DES complete-open-loop H_PI/H_obs gates under product-specific conserved resources.

families.searched_contract: native fixed-lead non-reservation kernel has exact action absence; frozen Program M synthetic extension completed selection and simultaneous six-cell H_PI validation but produced no passing connected region
families.evidence_required_to_terminalize: Program M is stopped and cannot be rescued by new cells. A global family closure would require a quantitative ceiling over a separately frozen broader reservation-physics envelope; a new active search requires a materially different mechanism.

families.searched_contract: current complete requested-demand recording; true lost-sales censoring/report action absent
families.evidence_required_to_terminalize: Validated censoring/report physics and a belief-DP or information-relaxation ceiling with report resources matched.

families.searched_contract: conditional central-dispatch domination only; no licensed lateral lane

quantitative_ceiling.scope: unresolved when a lateral lane is faster or differently resourced

families.evidence_required_to_terminalize: Authorized lateral-lane parameters and a joint central/lateral exact DP, MILP bound, or certified dominance proof.

families.searched_contract: Program H spatial contract with current-information super-policy ceiling

quantitative_ceiling.scope: Historical full-ledger and visible-v1 results are non-governing/quarantined. The governing adapter is also route/arm dead, so no v2 Program-H ceiling exists.

families.evidence_required_to_terminalize: Authorize and implement a causally live R22 route adapter, then replay all 81 four-week sequences through ret_excel_request_snapshot_v2. If v2 PI is material, solve or bound the four-stage observation-history/belief policy.

families.searched_contract: reduction to D1 when all orders remain mandatory and abandonment/deadlines are absent
families.evidence_required_to_terminalize: Validated mission deadlines/classes/admission authority and a full queue-control ceiling retaining original demand.

families.searched_contract: frozen Program J serial Op5-Op7 maintenance extension
families.evidence_metric: ret_excel_request_snapshot_v2 central development point; historical 108-cell screen used ret_excel_full_ledger

quantitative_ceiling.scope: central-cell 12-burned-tape request-snapshot-v2 resource-restricted PI point diagnostic versus the complete 3^8 open-loop frontier; 54.7 times below the 0.01 gate but not a family-wide or confidence-bounded ceiling

families.evidence_required_to_terminalize: Enumerate all 6,561 eight-week schedules per tape across the frozen 108-cell design under ret_excel_request_snapshot_v2 with complete crew and guardrail ledgers, confidence-bound the maximum cell-wise PI delta, and bound any newly licensed precursor/failure mechanism separately.

families.searched_contract: native independent parallel recovery clocks; scarce shared restoration team absent
families.evidence_required_to_terminalize: Validated team/travel/work/preemption facts and an exact restoration-permutation or DP ceiling.

families.searched_contract: native unlimited/nonbinding storage; finite nonfungible space extension absent
families.evidence_required_to_terminalize: Site capacity/overflow/relocation facts and a full allocation-calendar or network-flow ceiling.

families.searched_contract: fixed inspection/detection kernel; variable inspection effort and field escapes absent
families.evidence_required_to_terminalize: Validated inspection technology/quality signal/escape endpoint and a full inspection-policy ceiling.

families.searched_contract: current equivalent modes; no distinct finite mode assets or state-dependent mode physics
families.evidence_required_to_terminalize: Mode-specific authority/assets/lead/risk facts and a full mode-calendar or routing bound.

families.searched_contract: native route action absent; Program L tested one weak unequal-resource heuristic only
families.evidence_required_to_terminalize: Validated routes/fleet/route state and a resource-matched full-horizon route oracle or rigorous global bound.

families.searched_contract: executable M/T/R v1 with one 4,032-hour mutually exclusive team and identical reserve access
families.evidence_required_to_terminalize: Restart calibration from an immutable request-snapshot-v2 commit. A completed/custody-validated <=4 remains diagnostic only; require a full W24 optimizer or rigorous global upper bound with UCB95 below 0.01, plus Garrido metric/resource validation.

families.searched_contract: current evaluator has no conserved pre-mission carried-loadout decision
families.evidence_required_to_terminalize: Authorized conserved loadout physics and a full cohort/loadout allocation ceiling.

families.searched_contract: aggregate raw-material kernel; component identity and mixed-load dispatch action absent
families.evidence_required_to_terminalize: Component/BOM/pipeline/mixed-load facts and a full kit-balancing MILP/DP ceiling.

families.searched_contract: mandatory same-rate unit-yield rework; discretionary disposition action absent

quantitative_ceiling.scope: mandatory unit-yield same-rate rework null regime only

families.evidence_required_to_terminalize: Disposition authority/rework/replacement/quality facts and a full resource-matched disposition ceiling.

families.searched_contract: demand deletion/deferral forbidden; approved product substitution unvalidated
families.evidence_required_to_terminalize: Approved substitution matrix and a full product-substitution comparator/ceiling while retaining original demand.
